calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition Fro Release Of Property From L;Ien
Off Calendar Apr-08-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Not Reported. (D501)

Attorney, Douglas A. Applegate (415-979-0500), for petitioner
No Appearance by Respondent

The Court Adopts the Tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER PING TSE's Petition For Release Of Property From Lien is GRANTED. Petitioner shall recover costs in the amount of $460 and fees in the amount of $800. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Petition Of Ping Tse
Off Calendar Dec-29-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances: The Court Adopts the Tentative ruling as follows:

Petition Of Ping Tse is OFF CALENDAR. Notice required by Court's December 3, 2015 order has not been given until December 17, 2015, i.e. 12 days before hearing. Petitioner failed to comply with SFLR 2.6B and October 1, 2015 order and failed to provide courtesy copy of the petition. Judge Rebbeca A Wiseman, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Reported. (501)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Release Of Property Lien
Off Calendar Nov-02-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PETITIONER PING TSE Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Release Of Property Lien is OFF CALENDAR. No proof of service for Petition or the Motion on file. Also, moving party failed to comply with SFLR 2.6B and Court's October 1, 2015 minute order requiring compliance. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Release Of Property Lien
Off Calendar Oct-01-2015 Continued To Nov-02-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Ping Tse (415-994-1451) Plaintiff/Petitioner/Moving party in Pro Per assisted by Cantonese Interpreter Vivien Choy.
No other Appearance.

Petitioner's Petition for Release of Property Lien is Continued to November 2, 2015. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide a complete courtesy copy of the moving papers, including a copy of petition, to department 501 no later than October 16, 2015 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
